title: Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
company: Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners:
Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners!
